texto: When you write, you can hide behind your words. When you talk, you are up front, like the clown in the midway booth; and passersby can bean you with a ball.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Willard R. Espy: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “When you write, you can hide behind your words. When you talk, you are up front, like the clown i…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, writing, write pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
